action_choice_hints: Whether the action cell is in the same row or column as a special control token
If the action cell is the nearest unblocked cell to a control token along a cardinal direction
Whether there exists a contiguous segment of empty cells between the action cell and a boundary
If the action cell is adjacent to a static or obstacle token
Whether the action cell is within K steps of a moving or advance token
If the action cell is the first empty cell encountered in a scan from a control token
Whether the action cell is part of a contiguous run of empty cells of length at least N
If the action cell is blocked by an obstacle before reaching a boundary in a given direction
Whether the action cell is in a top or bottom band region of the grid
If all cells between the action cell and a control token are empty
Whether the action cell is directly above or below a drawn trace
If the action cell is the only candidate in its row or column satisfying a certain predicate
Whether the action cell is adjacent to a drawn trace or moving token
If the action cell is at the edge of a contiguous region of empty cells
Whether the action cell is the first available cell in a prioritized direction from a control token
transition_hints: Selecting a cell containing an advance control token causes a new drawn trace to appear at that location
Choosing an empty cell adjacent to a drawn trace extends the trace into that cell
Selecting a cell with a moving token causes the token to move in a specific direction
When a drawn trace is extended, it may convert adjacent empty cells into drawn trace tokens
Selecting a cell blocked by an obstacle does not change the grid
Choosing a cell at the boundary may trigger a special transition or no change
Selecting a cell adjacent to a static token may prevent further extension in that direction
When a moving token reaches an obstacle, it stops or changes state
Selecting a cell in a contiguous empty region may fill the entire region with a drawn trace
Actions on cells not adjacent to any special token result in no change
feature_family_hints: Directional scan features: needed to detect first available or blocked cells along rows or columns
Contiguity features: to capture runs or regions of empty or drawn trace cells
Adjacency features: to determine if a cell is next to a static, obstacle, or drawn trace token
Relative position features: to encode distance or steps from control or moving tokens
Band/region features: to distinguish actions in top, bottom, or central grid regions
Obstacle constraint features: to check if a path is blocked before reaching a boundary
Edge detection features: to identify if a cell is at the edge of a region or the grid
Global count features: to represent the number of special tokens present in the grid
Unique candidate features: to determine if a cell is the only one in its row/column satisfying a predicate
Path extension features: to model whether a trace can be extended from a given cell
Support features: to check if a cell is supported by a static or drawn trace below
Nearest neighbor features: to find the closest control or moving token to a candidate cell
Blocked path features: to encode whether a direction is blocked by an obstacle before reaching a target
Local context features: to capture the configuration of a cell and its immediate neighbors
Transition-triggering features: to detect if an action will cause a state change in the grid

diversity_requirements: Include both local (adjacency) and global (row/column scan) predicate templates
Require at least one template that combines relative position with obstacle presence
placeholder_usage_limits: Limit templates to at most two free coordinate placeholders per feature
Restrict directional scan templates to a maximum of two directions per feature
avoidances: Avoid templates that only check for the presence of a single token role at a fixed location
Do not allow templates that duplicate the same predicate with only minor parameter changes
